bugs.title: Race Condition: Non-Atomic Backup Index Write
bugs.claim: Concurrent backup operations can corrupt backup_index.json due to lack of file locking

evidence.issue: Multiple threads creating backups simultaneously can interleave writes
evidence.impact: Backup index corruption, lost backup records

bugs.runtime_trigger: Two simultaneous profile applications or manual backups
bugs.fix_description: Implement file locking using fcntl.flock() (Unix) or msvcrt.locking() (Windows), or use a mutex around _save_index() calls

bugs.title: Resource Leak: Unclosed subprocess.Popen in Timeout Scenario
bugs.claim: When subprocess.TimeoutExpired occurs, process is terminated but stdout/stderr pipes may not be fully drained

evidence.issue: cancel() calls terminate() and kill(), but reader threads may still be blocked on readline()
evidence.impact: Thread leak, potential deadlocks, resource exhaustion

bugs.runtime_trigger: Any batch script that exceeds timeout (default 300s)
bugs.fix_description: Before terminating process, close stdout/stderr pipes to unblock reader threads. Set self.process.stdout/stderr to None after close.

bugs.title: Security: Directory Traversal via Preset Import Filepath
bugs.claim: import_preset_from_file() doesn't validate that filepath is within allowed directory

evidence.issue: No validation that filepath resolves to a safe location before reading
evidence.impact: Could read arbitrary JSON files from filesystem (information disclosure)

bugs.runtime_trigger: User imports a preset with path like '../../../../sensitive.json'
bugs.fix_description: Implement path validation: if not any(filepath.resolve().is_relative_to(root) for root in allowed_roots): raise ValueError

bugs.title: Runtime Error: FileNotFoundError Not Handled in Registry Export
bugs.claim: If 'reg.exe' is missing or path is invalid, subprocess.run() fails but error is only logged

evidence.issue: FileNotFoundError from subprocess.run() is caught by outer try/except but only logs warning
evidence.impact: Partial backups created without user notification, false sense of security

bugs.runtime_trigger: Windows environment with corrupted system32, PATH issues, or antivirus blocking reg.exe
bugs.fix_description: Check for FileNotFoundError explicitly and mark backup as failed if reg.exe is not available

bugs.title: Logic Error: Flight Recorder State Not Reset on Partial Failure
bugs.claim: If start_recording() succeeds but finish_recording() is never called, current_snapshot remains stale

evidence.issue: If exception occurs between start/finish, subsequent record_change() calls go to stale snapshot
evidence.impact: Changes recorded in wrong snapshot, corrupted audit trail

bugs.runtime_trigger: Exception during profile application after start_recording() but before finish_recording()
bugs.fix_description: Use try/finally pattern to ensure current_snapshot is cleared, or add context manager protocol

bugs.title: Race Condition: Mutable Singleton Without Synchronization
bugs.claim: Global _flight_recorder_instance accessed without locks in get_flight_recorder()

evidence.issue: Two threads could both see None and create two instances
evidence.impact: Multiple FlightRecorder instances writing to same storage_dir, data corruption

bugs.runtime_trigger: Multiple threads accessing flight recorder during initialization
cross_references: clutchg/src/app_minimal.py:17-24 (no threading during init, but views may call later)
bugs.fix_description: Use threading.Lock() around singleton check, or use module-level __init__ pattern

bugs.title: Runtime Error: Integer Overflow Risk in CPU Score Calculation
bugs.claim: benchmark_db.get_cpu_score() may return None that's not handled before arithmetic

evidence.issue: If cpu_score is None (no match), assigning to score dataclass field may fail type check or cause issues
evidence.impact: TypeError or incorrect score display, potential crash in tier calculation

bugs.runtime_trigger: CPU model name not found in benchmark database
bugs.fix_description: Add fallback: score = cpu_score if cpu_score is not None else 10

bugs.title: Security: PowerShell Injection via Restore Point Name
bugs.claim: Sanitization in _sanitize_restore_point_name() may miss edge cases in command interpolation

evidence.code_snippet:
dangerous = set("'\"`;$(){}|\n\r")
sanitized = "".join(ch for ch in name if ch not in dangerous)
ps_command = (
    f'Checkpoint-Computer -Description "ClutchG: {safe_name}"'
    f' -RestorePointType "MODIFY_SETTINGS" -ErrorAction Stop'
)
evidence.issue: While basic dangerous chars are stripped, the string is still interpolated via f-string into PS command
evidence.impact: If new dangerous patterns emerge, bypass could allow arbitrary PS execution

bugs.runtime_trigger: User creates backup with crafted name exploiting bypass
bugs.fix_description: Use PowerShell parameterized commands: -Description $desc with arguments passed as variables, not string interpolation

bugs.title: Logic Error: Snapshot Cleanup Not Atomic
bugs.claim: cleanup_old_snapshots() deletes files individually without transaction

evidence.issue: If process is killed mid-cleanup, orphaned .reg files may remain

bugs.fix_description: Use temporary directory rename pattern: move files to temp dir, then delete. If interrupted, temp dir can be cleaned on next run.

bugs.title: Resource Leak: WMI Connection Not Closed
bugs.claim: WMI connection created but never explicitly closed

evidence.issue: No __del__ or close() method to release WMI resources
evidence.impact: WMI COM object leak, potential RPC handles exhaustion

bugs.runtime_trigger: Long-running application with multiple SystemDetector instances
cross_references: clutchg/src/app_minimal.py:23 (creates single SystemDetector instance, mitigating impact)
bugs.fix_description: Add close() method and call wmi_conn.Delete() if available, or use context manager pattern

bugs.title: Runtime Error: UI Thread Blocking on Synchronous Detection
bugs.claim: detect_gpu() calls subprocess.run() with timeout=5, but if called from UI thread can freeze

evidence.issue: Multiple sequential subprocess calls can take 15+ seconds total
evidence.impact: UI freeze during system detection if not run in background thread

bugs.runtime_trigger: System detection triggered from UI without proper threading
cross_references: clutchg/src/app_minimal.py:102-107 (does use threading.Thread for detect_all, mitigating this)
bugs.fix_description: Already mitigated by app_minimal.py threading. Document requirement in docstring.

bugs.title: Security: Batch Script Validation Pattern Too Permissive
bugs.claim: validate_script() blocks exact patterns but could miss bypass variants

evidence.issue: Case-insensitive search (content_lower) but patterns like 'bcdedit/delete' (no space) may bypass
evidence.impact: Malicious scripts could bypass validation if pattern matching has gaps
evidence.mitigation: Scripts are from trusted src/ directory, reducing risk

bugs.runtime_trigger: Malicious actor modifies batch scripts in src/ directory
bugs.fix_description: Use regex with word boundaries, or token-based parsing instead of substring matching. Add unit tests for known bypass patterns.

bugs.title: Logic Error: Config Load No Schema Validation
bugs.claim: load_config() merges user config without validating keys or values

evidence.issue: Malicious user_config.json could inject arbitrary keys
evidence.impact: Application may crash or behave unpredictably with invalid config values

bugs.runtime_trigger: User manually edits user_config.json with invalid keys or types
bugs.fix_description: Implement schema validation: reject unknown keys, validate value types against defaults schema

bugs.title: State Corruption: Profile Manager Concurrent Execution
bugs.claim: apply_profile() creates new BatchExecutor per call, but active_profile state has no synchronization

evidence.code_snippet:
executor = BatchExecutor(on_output=on_output, on_progress=on_progress)
...
if overall_success:
    self.active_profile = profile.name
evidence.issue: Two concurrent profile applications could race on active_profile assignment
evidence.impact: Incorrect active_profile displayed, no crash but wrong state shown to user

bugs.runtime_trigger: User triggers profile application while another is in progress
bugs.fix_description: Add execution lock or flag to prevent concurrent profile applications. Disable UI controls during execution.

bugs.title: Runtime Error: Missing Error Handling in JSON Parse
bugs.claim: Subprocess result parsed as int without checking if output is numeric

evidence.issue: If PowerShell returns error text instead of count, int() raises ValueError
evidence.impact: Snapshot capture fails partially, missing data points

bugs.runtime_trigger: PowerShell execution fails or returns unexpected format
bugs.fix_description: Add try/except around int() conversion with fallback to 0. Log actual output for debugging.
